linux.changelog: - Added settings for enabling/disabling autoinstall on startup\n- Refined autoinstall logic for linux \n- Updated mocap checks - now actively scans if any data has actually been receved from a new mocap multicast interface and shows debug hints

windows.changelog: - Added settings for enabling/disabling autoinstall on startup\n- Refined autoinstall logic for linux \n- Updated mocap checks - now actively scans if any data has actually been receved from a new mocap multicast interface and shows debug hints
